# SCError()

**Function**

Returns an error or status code associated with the most recent function call.

## Declaration

```swift
func SCError() -> Int32
```

## Return Value

The most recent status or error code generated as the result of calling a function defined by the System Configuration framework. See [doc://com.apple.systemconfiguration/documentation/SystemConfiguration/1518026-status-and-error-codes] for descriptions of these codes.

## Functions

- **SCCopyLastError()**: Returns an error or status code associated with the most recent function call.
- **SCErrorString(_:)**: Returns a string describing the specified status code or error code.
